tiers.title: Priority tiers
tiers.subtitle: Build a priority list of model + key endpoints. Within a tier requests rotate round-robin; when a whole tier hits its limits it automatically falls over to the next. Tip: add the same key with different models in one tier to use separate per-model quotas.
tiers.noKeys: No API keys yet. Add one above first, then reference it here.
tiers.empty: No tiers yet. Add a tier to start building your priority list.
tiers.tierEmpty: Empty tier — add at least one endpoint.
tiers.footerHint: Changes are saved automatically and used by the Translate tab.
tiers.noneConfigured: No translation tiers configured. Open Settings → LLM & API Keys and add at least one endpoint.
